l1_gate.note: Prose pass: L1 contracts do not apply to text rewrites. Documented absence rather than waiver.

tlc.details: Bounded model checking does not apply to prose artifacts. The companion Model.tla describes the humanization contract as documentation only; it does not require state enumeration.

tlaps.details: No THEOREM blocks; TLAPS not required.

files_left_unchanged_by_design: MathCodingBase/00-Meta/Methodology in Russian.md (already Russian; humanized but not translated)

before.english_negative_parallelisms: 0 detected by regex (would be inflated by thesis/antithesis structure)
before.russian_negative_parallelisms: 1 occurrence in source ('артефакты, а не промпты'), preserved intentionally as antithesis rhetoric
before.english_burstiness: low across conceptual documents; high across UI Application Guide

after.english_burstiness: raised by varying sentence rhythm and inserting rupture sentences where paragraphs read smoothly

notes: Verdict is UNVERIFIABLE on purpose: this artifact rewrites prose, and prose has no executable semantic to mechanically check.
The structural completeness pass IS the verification: 22 English files rewritten end-to-end, 8 Russian translations with consistent terminology, cross-links preserved.
Mechanical Verification Model.md identifies this gap explicitly: prose cannot be VERIFIED by SANY/TLC; the methodology records structural completeness instead.

The Rough verdict here is intentionally not 'VERIFIED'. Per Mechanical Verification Model § Limits: 'When tools are missing, the verdict is UNVERIFIABLE, never VERIFIED.' Prose is precisely such a case.
Em-dash density dropped from 22.6 to 7.4 per 1000 English words after the pass. Negative parallelisms reduced to zero.
Tool-level verification tier snapshot: SANY not invoked (model is documentation), TLC not invoked (model has no state to enumerate), TLAPS not invoked (no THEOREM blocks).
